tool.name: SingleCellExperiment: Select features
tool.description: by rowData pattern in a SingleCellExperiment object

param.name: pattern
param.label: Regex pattern to select
param.help: e.g. ^MT- to select human mitochondrial genes

tool.help:
**What it does**
Searches a ``rowData`` column of a ``SingleCellExperiment`` object for rows selecting a regular expression pattern, and returns the corresponding ``rownames`` (feature identifiers) as a plain text file, one per line, with no header.
**Inputs**
- A ``SingleCellExperiment`` object saved as a loom file. - The name of a ``rowData`` column to search (e.g. ``Symbol``). - A regular expression pattern (e.g. ``^MT-`` for human mitochondrial genes).
**Outputs**
- A plain text file listing the selected feature identifiers, one per line. This can be used as input to other tools that accept gene lists.
